text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
371 
PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_1M 

LABEL: 
Pre-ICL Mail Order Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the 
Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_1M 
TYPE:
